name: forgekit
description: Project-level workflow harness for Codex, Claude Code, and adjacent AI coding tools, with versioned safe migrations, intent routing, report-only delivery reports, bounded loop policy, and opt-in native agent templates.

interface.shortDescription: Project workflow harness for AI coding tools.
interface.longDescription: ForgeKit provides shared skills, project templates, read-only checks, intent routing, report-only doc health, source trace, and review-ready handoff package reports, bounded loop policy templates, and opt-in reviewable native agent configuration templates for project initialization, handover, review, release, and safety gates across Codex and Claude Code. It does not provide automatic agent execution, automatic document rewriting, commits, or PRs.
defaultPrompt: Use ForgeKit to initialize this project.
Use ForgeKit to run a handover review.
Use ForgeKit to check this project before release.
